task.title: Provide optional ThinkCode runtime adapter
task.summary: Cancelled in roadmap transition after KB boundary refactor: ThinkCode remains an optional agent helper, not core CodeWiki roadmap work. Recreate only if a concrete adapter/runtime need appears after API, graph, and agency semantics stabilize.

goal.outcome: CodeWiki can prefer ThinkCode when available but remains usable from any agent runtime through views, CLI/gateway, MCP/future adapters, or native tools.
acceptance: Runtime docs describe ThinkCode as optional, not required memory or execution substrate.
Adapter contract identifies where `think-code.policy.json` lives and how staged writes are validated.
Fallback paths are documented for native CodeWiki gateway/views when ThinkCode is unavailable.
The design supports future Codex and Claude Code adapters without Pi-specific assumptions.
non_goals: Do not make ThinkCode a hard dependency.
Do not let ThinkCode bypass CodeWiki canonical write rules or mutate generated views directly.
verification: Validate gateway manifest still advertises CodeWiki capabilities independent of ThinkCode.
Check skills mention optional fallback behavior clearly.
